name: Zhuxin
intro: Zhuxin, the Beacon of Spirits, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Crimson Butterflies
abilities.description: Buff Every time Zhuxin channels Lantern Flare , she converts the Mana spent into up to 15 Crimson Butterflies to follow her Spirit Lantern . After Zhuxin stops channeling Lantern Flare , the Crimson Butterflies will gradually disappear, each restoring 3% of her Max Mana. Zhuxin has a naturally high base Max Mana, but it doesn't scale with her level.

abilities.name: Fluttering Grace
abilities.description: AOE Buff | Spell Vamp Ratio: 50% Zhuxin deals 150–210 (+30% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to all enemies in a fan-shaped area and applies 1 stack(s) of Soul Snare . Zhuxin also slows all enemy heroes hit by 20%–40% and gains 20%–40% of extra Movement Speed herself for 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Lantern Flare
abilities.description: Damage CC | Spell Vamp Ratio: 50% Hold : Zhuxin can move the Spirit Lantern with the skill button, dealing 35–80 (+30% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to all enemies within range every 0.33 seconds ( Magic Power increases to 60% against Minions ) and applying Soul Snare to enemy heroes hit. Each time (wether it hits a unit or not) consuming 90 Mana . When an enemy hero has 10 stacks of Soul Snare, the Crimson Butterflies will capture them, pulling them airborne for 1 second. Release : Throws all captured enemies to the target location, dealing 200–400 (+150% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage + 10%-15% of target's Max HP to all enemies in the area. (If an enemy takes damage multiple times, subsequent damage taken will be reduced by 80%.) After a target is captured, Soul Snare cannot stack on them again for 4s. During this time, this skill deals 15% increased damage to that target.

abilities.name: Crimson Beacon
abilities.description: Shield Mobility | Spell Vamp Ratio: 50% Zhuxin blinks to the target location while gaining a 400–700 (+100% Total Magic Power) shield . While flying, she creates a field around her for 6 seconds. The field deals 30–45 (+10% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and applies 1 stack of Soul Snare to enemies every 0.5 seconds.
